tags.name: uui-responsive-container
tags.description: A responsive container that collapses overflowing children into a dropdown.

attributes.name: collapse
attributes.description:
Controls which side items collapse from.
- "end": Items collapse from the right, more button appears on right (default)
- "start": Items collapse from the left, more button appears on left

properties.name: collapse
properties.description:
Controls which side items collapse from.
- "end": Items collapse from the right, more button appears on right (default)
- "start": Items collapse from the left, more button appears on left

slots.description: Default slot for child elements (buttons, etc.)
